name: Dev Demoson
title: Full-Stack Developer & Interactive Experience Builder
bio: Dev Demoson is a fictional demonstration developer who builds playful, data-driven web experiences. This profile is sample content shipped to show how the Portfolio World Engine populates its handcrafted scenes.
knowledgeSummary: Comfortable across the modern web stack — TypeScript, React, and Next.js on the front end, Node services and SQL/NoSQL data stores on the back end, plus real-time 3D in the browser with WebGL engines.
workSummary: Has shipped interactive portfolio worlds, a collaborative whiteboard, and a small fleet of developer tools, always favouring clear architecture and swappable, data-driven content.
thinkingApproach: Starts from the story a system needs to tell, decomposes it into independently replaceable parts, and validates assumptions early with small, testable slices before scaling up.
futureDirection: Exploring AI-assisted authoring tooling and richer handcrafted scenes so non-developers can populate immersive portfolios by editing plain data files.
collaborationValue: Brings calm, pragmatic delivery: communicates trade-offs plainly, keeps systems simple enough to hand off, and leaves documentation a teammate can actually follow.
